summary: Completed comprehensive Stage 1 Foundation testing for CrickPredict Fantasy Cricket Prediction PWA. All core infrastructure components are working correctly.
passed_tests: API Root Endpoint (/api) returns correct app info
Health Check API (/api/health) shows MongoDB healthy and Redis disabled
CORS Configuration properly set for cross-origin requests
Frontend loads successfully with Stage 1 status UI
Backend API status shows as Connected in UI
MongoDB status displays healthy with latency (0.83ms)
Redis status shows as Disabled (acceptable for Stage 1)
PWA Ready status shows as Installable
Architecture section displays all technology stack components
Stage 1 Checklist shows all 12 items with green checkmarks
Dark theme UI renders correctly with proper colors
PWA manifest.json is accessible with all required fields
Service worker file is accessible with proper caching implementation
